task_description: Integrate login/registration authentication, per-user data isolation for medications and water intake, and a daily history page showing medication adherence and water intake over time. Users authenticate with email/password to get their own session, and their email is used for medication reminder notifications.

verification.summary: Production build succeeds with all routes. ESLint passes with no errors. Review feedback addressed: shared JWT secret, @types/bcryptjs moved to devDependencies, timezone validation at registration, history page uses user timezone, redundant middleware path checks removed.
